Life is precious and so buying health insurance policy or Mediclaim policy could be a very difficult decision for us as we all would want to buy the best health insurance policy in India for ourselves. With different medical insurance policy in India, different term insurance policies, several claiming to be the best health insurance; There are a lot of options out there in the market to confuse us. To really buy the best policy for ourselves we need to know all about medical insurance, health insurance plans with a comparative analysis of Mediclaim vs health insurance. So, Asset Yogi brings you this video with Mediclaim explained in Hindi, details of health insurance in Hindi, a live demo of how to buy health insurance from policy bazaar explaining how to buy health insurance online easily with just a few clicks.

12) Claim settlement Ratio (>85%)

All health insurance companies are same .Once the policy is taken they send 20-25 pages terms and conditions which are difficult to remember .The IRDA rules ought to be in favour of policyholders but it is other way here as all protections and rights are in favour of insurance Companies .
Once the insurance is being taken it should start immediately after issue of policy .Exclusions and waiting period for certain illness should be done away with as it is against interest of policyholders  as all young and old people are taking policies .At the time of taking policy company records everything and tall claims are made but in case of  need things are totally against interest of policyholders .In case of restoration cover also things are not clear as in some cases it is informed that it is for same disease and some say it covers different disease also .Then there is confusion about restoration as to when amount will be restrord whether after   spending of full coverage amount or even after lesser amount of coverage has been spent .There are many things as over a period cif tìme Companies change their names or change their collaborators .Sometimes there being problem in Company with TPA etc  or other problem  they announce  that till further announcement no cashless treatment will be done as happened in MAX sometime back even if you have cashless policy .Something should be considered for those taking policies .A reasonable profitability of Health insurance companies should be fixed so that their whole attention is not towards  maximum  profitability only

comments.text:
Hello Praveen ji,
It is considered a good practice to disclose changes in health condition at the time of renewal. Hypertension is classified as "specified illness" by IRDA and involves waiting period of 2 years irrespective of your disclosure.
